title: Government to propose electricity price changes in clean power push
description: The war in the Middle East has brought renewed attention to Britain's vulnerability to energy price shocks.
content:
The government is to announce on Tuesday a plan to weaken the link between electricity and volatile gas prices, which it says will better protect consumers from energy shocks triggered by international conflicts.

title: King honours his 'darling Mama', the late Queen, on her centenary
description: The final design for a statue of the late Queen Elizabeth is to be unveiled, 100 years after her birth.
content:
King Charles has delivered a personal video message remembering the life of public service of his "darling Mama", the late Queen Elizabeth II, on what would have been her 100th birthday.
